rationale: Governance/process documentation PR. Adds three new markdown artifacts: `docs/adr/ADR-007-third-party-structural-review.md` (the ADR formalising the gate, marked `[DECISION REQUIRED]`), `01_truth/processes/2026-05_third-party-structural-review_sop_v1.md` (the SOP — when to trigger, procedure, context pack, reviewer role), and `docs/GITHUB_GOVERNANCE_BUS.md` (architecture v2 incorporating gap parking, reconciliation job, governance export, noise reduction, dead man's switch). Updates `00_authority/DECISION_LOG.md` from version 25 to 26 with the new decision entry, and `00_authority/MANIFEST.md` from version 69 to 70 with three new file references and a v70 changelog block listing the additions, each `[LOGIC TO BE CONFIRMED]` tagged per the repo's convention. Every file reference in the manifest entry points to one of the three newly-added files; the pre-merge checklist items (manifest indexing, version bump, decision log pointer) are satisfied. No code changes, no tests touched, no cheat surface.
